tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Bhayshul Tuten scores 61-yard rushing touchdown) 2024/10/17 ESHEET

videos.headline: Kyron Drones powers through for 11-yard VT TD
videos.description: Kyron Drones fights off Boston College defenders to put Virginia Tech on the board with an early lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Kyron Drones powers through for 11-yard VT TD) 2024/10/17 ESHEET

videos.headline: Kyron Drones barges over for another VT TD
videos.description: Kyron Drones pushes through the pileup for a tush push touchdown, marking his second score of the first quarter within 3 minutes.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Kyron Drones barges over for another VT TD) 2024/10/17 ESHEET

videos.headline: Bhayshul Tuten takes it to the house for an 83-yard VT TD
videos.description: Bhayshul Tuten finds the gap and it takes it all the way for another Virginia Tech touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Bhayshul Tuten takes it to the house for an 83-yard VT TD) 2024/10/17 ESHEET

videos.headline: Kyron Drones connects with Bhayshul Tuten for 20-yard TD
videos.description: Kyron Drones completes a 20-yard pass to Bhayshul Tuten, who turns it into a touchdown, giving Virginia Tech their biggest halftime lead since 2019.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Kyron Drones connects with Bhayshul Tuten for 20-yard TD) 2024/10/17 ESHEET

videos.headline: Treshaun Ward's 25-yard TD puts Boston College on the board
videos.description: Thomas Castellanos connects with Treshaun Ward on a 25-yard touchdown, Boston College's first score to cut into Virginia Tech's lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Treshaun Ward's 25-yard TD puts Boston College on the board) 2024/10/17 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jeremiah Franklin snags TD for Boston College
videos.description: Thomas Castellanos hits Jeremiah Franklin with an 11-yard pass for a touchdown as Boston College inches closer to Virginia Tech.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jeremiah Franklin snags TD for Boston College) 2024/10/17 ESHEET

videos.headline: Bhayshul Tuten rushes in for 6-yard rushing touchdown
videos.description: Bhayshul Tuten rushes in for 6-yard rushing touchdown

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Bhayshul Tuten rushes in for 6-yard rushing touchdown) 2024/10/17 ESHEET

videos.headline: Bhayshul Tuten breaks free for a 61-yard VT TD
videos.description: Bhayshul Tuten dashes through an open pocket for a 61-yard run, his fourth touchdown of the night for Virginia Tech.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Bhayshul Tuten breaks free for a 61-yard VT TD) 2024/10/17 ESHEET
